html:
Exclusive to:

The Ancient Kiln is a object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be found in the Ancient Archive biome.

Ancient Kilns act the same as a regular Crock Pot, except they naturally spawn with 1 Collected Dust inside. It can be hammered but will not drop anything.

Trivia

  • The Ancient Kiln was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Ancient Kiln
Object Info
Perk
Can cook food.
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Ancient Archive
Miscellaneous
"archive_cookpot"
“Let's dust off this old crockery, shall we?”
–Wilson, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“Fire's the best ancient invention there is!”
–Willow, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“Is dusty old pot.”
–Wolfgang, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“It's covered in dust.”
–Wendy, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“RUDIMENTARY COOKING DEVICE”
–WX-78, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“I suspect it must have had a purpose specific to these chambers.”
–Wickerbottom, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“I'm guessin' this hasn't been used in a while.”
–Woodie, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“They didn't always live off of the fuel.”
–Maxwell, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“There is nö meat inside, sö I care nöt.”
–Wigfrid, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“Bugs get hungry too! We should know!”
–Webber, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“The ones who lived here had good taste in cookware.”
–Warly, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“Dusty”
–Wormwood, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“Seems to be the only thing those critters haven't dusted.”
–Winona, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“I think whatever was cooking has gone cold.”
–Wortox, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“Is old and dusty.”
–Wurt, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“They weren't so different from us, were they?”
–Walter, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
“I'd say it's been a few centuries since this was last used.”
–Wanda, when the Ancient Kiln is empty.
The Ancient Kiln is a object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be found in the Ancient Archive biome.
Ancient Kilns act the same as a regular Crock Pot, except they naturally spawn with 1 Collected Dust inside. It can be hammered but will not drop anything.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Ancient Kiln was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

The '''Ancient Kiln''' is a object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It can be found in the [[Ancient Archive]] biome.

Ancient Kilns act the same as a regular [[Crock Pot]], except they naturally spawn with 1 [[Collected Dust]] inside. It can be hammered but will not drop anything.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* The Ancient Kiln was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Forgotten Knowledge|Forgotten Knowledge]]'' update.
